author: Genshin Impact
text:
Character Trailer - "Nicole: An Epic Adventure Story" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Nicole
Writing a full story is nothing like putting together a Teyvat travelogue. You cannot just write the exciting bits and hand-wave the route and background.
"Even the miserable parts of the trip and the worldbuilding no one wants to deal with are important!" That sounds like something Mr. Nine would say.

VA:
Nicole Reeyn of the Hexenzirkel, codename "N" — Sophie Shad
Mr. Nine — Aiden Dawn
Ellin — Natalie Lander
Prune — Alice Himora
Mona — Felecia Angelle
Sucrose — Maya Graydon

Chinese Voice-Over Video: https://youtu.be/8VJnjax_EwM
Japanese Voice-Over Video: https://youtu.be/nyIrSUZK5hg
Korean Voice-Over Video: https://youtu.be/T80M1-9jN0E
